provenance.generation: deterministic fixtures generated from tools/audiotest/synth_tech3341.py; this source tree includes the WAVs so conformance tests need no Python or numpy

fixtures.description: 1 kHz stereo sine, 20 s, calibrated to -23.0 LUFS integrated (K-weighting gain divided out so the fixture's TRUE loudness is -23.0)
1 kHz stereo sine, 60 s, calibrated to -33.0 LUFS integrated (K-weighting gain divided out)
EBU case 3: 10 s @-36 / 60 s @-23 / 10 s @-36 LUFS — the -36 blocks pass the -70 abs gate but fail the relative gate; expected integrated -23.0 LUFS
EBU case 4: 10 s @-72 / 10 s @-36 / 60 s @-23 / 10 s @-36 LUFS — the -72 block is dropped by the -70 ABSOLUTE gate, the -36 blocks fail the relative gate; expected integrated -23.0 LUFS
Embedded inter-sample peak stress case at decimation offset 0; independent true-peak oracle must read +0.0 dBTP within 0.1 dB before publication
Embedded inter-sample peak stress case at decimation offset 1; independent true-peak oracle must read +0.0 dBTP within 0.1 dB before publication
Embedded inter-sample peak stress case at decimation offset 2; independent true-peak oracle must read +0.0 dBTP within 0.1 dB before publication
Embedded inter-sample peak stress case at decimation offset 3; independent true-peak oracle must read +0.0 dBTP within 0.1 dB before publication

diff_floor_class_definitions.spec_band_0p1lu: EBU Tech 3341 published acceptance band (0.1 LU)
diff_floor_class_definitions.spec_band_0p1db: EBU Tech 3341 published true-peak acceptance band (0.1 dB)
